content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Taxes". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/contest/735/problem/D
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer n, which is the number of people. The second line contains n integers, representing the amount of money each person has.
content.outputFormat: The minimum amount of taxes that need to be paid.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Sort the money array in descending order and calculate the taxes for each person.

code.Python3:
n = int(input())
money = list(map(int, input().split()))
money.sort()
taxes = 0
for i in range(n):
    if money[i] > 20:
        taxes += money[i] - 20
print(taxes)
